sample_instructions: {'task_index': 0, '__index_level_0__': 'Go straight on the secondary road for 0.7 km, observe the speed limit of 70 km/h.'}

{'task_index': 4, '__index_level_0__': 'Go straight for 10 m through the intersection following the right before left rule and bear right for 30 m through the uncontrolled pedestrian crossing and then go straight on the tertiary road for 250 m, observe the speed limit of 50 km/h.'}

{'task_index': 6, '__index_level_0__': 'Make a U-turn and then go straight for 50 m.'}

{'task_index': 11, '__index_level_0__': 'reverse out and then go straight on the service road for 150 m on the one way street.'}
